notes: Full menu captured including raw bar, small plates, large plates, sides, and desserts. Oyster prices are per-oyster/market-style with add-on sauces noted; agave flights and merch/cookbooks excluded from dishes. A 22% service charge is added to all dine-in checks. Bottle-only beverage list is minimal; two dessert wines captured.
